heroKicker: Ship copy like you ship features.
heroLede: Same JSON shape as dcx-client-app—prove the GitHub → Lokalise → runtime loop here before you touch prod.
cardPipelineCaption: If it fits on a napkin, your translators can reason about it. If it does not, fix the product first.
cardFiltersHint: Every line below is a real key. Edit JSON, let Lokalise pull, refresh—watch the DOM obey.
cardErrorHint: Config errors should sound human in every language—not like cold leftovers from another era.
footerLine: Darwin CX · Built to fail safely in staging, not in your sprint demo.
pageDashboardLede: Stat-style labels from the dashboard namespace—no live data.
pageMarketingLede: Subset of marketing keys synced from Darwin for this POC.
pageCustomerCareLede: Subset of customer care copy for search and subscription patterns.
pageReportingLede: Reporting labels for a read-only demo surface.
pageAdminLede: Admin form labels pulled from Darwin strings.
pageSettingsLede: Manage your account preferences, notification channels, and display options.

settings.hintNotifications: Choose how and when you want to be notified about campaign updates and system events.
settings.hintDeleteAccount: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
settings.toastSaved: Your settings have been saved successfully.
settings.toastReset: Settings have been reset to their default values.

pageBillingLede: View your subscription plan, manage payment methods, and download past invoices.

billing.hintUsageReset: Usage counters reset at the start of each billing cycle.
billing.alertOverdue: You have an overdue invoice. Please update your payment method to avoid service interruption.

pageIntegrationsLede: Connect Darwin CX to payment processors, marketing platforms, and analytics tools. Manage active connections and review sync history.

integrations.descriptionStripe: Process subscription payments, refunds, and credit card updates.
integrations.descriptionPayPal: Accept PayPal payments for one-time and recurring subscriptions.
integrations.descriptionCyberSource: Enterprise payment processing with fraud detection for high-volume publishers.
integrations.descriptionBraintree: Payment gateway supporting credit cards, digital wallets, and auto-renewal billing cycles.
integrations.descriptionHubSpot: Sync subscriber data for marketing campaigns and cohort building.
integrations.descriptionMailchimp: Send promotional campaign emails to segmented subscriber lists.
integrations.descriptionGoogleAnalytics: Track subscriber journey, retention metrics, and campaign performance.
integrations.descriptionSegment: Pipe subscriber events to your analytics stack for advanced cohort analysis.
integrations.healthHintMonitored: Health metrics are monitored continuously. Contact support if an integration enters the Error status for more than 15 minutes.
integrations.alertPendingReview: One of your integrations requires re-authentication. Review the connection before your next billing cycle.
integrations.emptyAvailable: You have connected every available integration. Request a new one from the integrations marketplace.
integrations.toastDisconnected: Integration disconnected. Subscriber sync will stop at the next cycle.
integrations.toastSyncStarted: Sync started. Refresh in a moment to see the updated status.
integrations.confirmDisconnect: Disconnecting this integration will stop data sync for all active subscriptions. Are you sure?

pageAudienceLede: Manage subscribers, segment cohorts by behavior, and monitor retention and churn across every active subscription.

audience.segmentRulesEngaged: Opened last 3 issues and renewal in next 90 days
audience.segmentRulesAtRisk: No engagement in 60 days and renewal due
audience.hintCohortBuilder: Use the cohort builder to create reusable subscriber groups based on retention, journey stage, and renewal behavior.
audience.alertHighChurnRisk: Churn rate exceeded the 5% threshold this period. Review the at-risk segment before the next renewal cycle.
audience.toastCohortExported: Cohort exported to your downloads folder.
audience.toastSegmentCreated: Segment created successfully and is now available across campaigns.
audience.toastCampaignQueued: Promotional campaign queued for the selected cohort.
